famous quote:
The secret of change is to focus all of your energy, not on fighting the old, but on building the new.
-Socrates
Interview Text:
Jacob (name changed):

(part 1)

Jacob has seen God working in his life. 

The Lord has worked in Jacob's life for a while, but he became receptive to the Lords calling in the last couple of years. He felt like he wasn't living his Christianity from time to time but over the pandemic something changed. 

After seeing disconcerting behavior in his church Jacob asked himself "How can believers worship political figures, despise the Chinese, ignore large swaths of the Bible, and yet actually be believers?" Jacob's eyes were open to the secret state of many peoples' real beliefs and where they placed faith that should have been reserved for Jesus. He has a passion for China, her people, and has more respect for their culture than ours in many ways. 

Jacob has a heavy heart for the sickly state of Western culture. For his son's sake, he prays that it heals, but he doesn't see that happening. In his view a lot of Westerners are far too proud to ask for redemption from a place of humility. He feels this is especially true inside many churches. 

His church asked why he was leaving and he said what was true, he felt like he was "being called into the wilderness." They didn't like this answer but he pointed out many in the Bible who had to go into the wilderness where God changed them. He told me he knows that Biblical figures like Joseph and Moses made big changes when they were around 40, like he is. 

One morning he decided not to go to his weekly Bible study because he felt God say, "Stay home and I will teach you" He went and got his Bible that has both English and Chinese in parallel and he began studying. Studying in Chinese began to open up the scriptures in ways that he had never known before. This happened a couple times and started a season of deep renewal. 

Recently a family member close to Jacob texted him because she had seen news of a school shooting and she felt strongly on the issue. It started quite antagonistic, but he prayed for God to be in the room with him and with her during the text chat. From that moment on it seemed the whole feeling of the conversation changed. And eventually it turned into a conversation about forgiveness and he got to share God's message with her for an hour. 

Both he and his son Michael had dreams that seemed prophetic about a very important person in their lives. She isn't following the Lord but a lot of people are praying for her. One day Jacob had a dream he was going to pick up Michael from a white house because a disease was running rampant. The house was filled the with disease and Jacob was trying to prevent Michael from getting it. He saw her and she looked dead on the ground outside, skin blackened, and grey. She looked like she had been burnt severely. She got up, like a zombie and faced him nose to nose. Her eyes were just absent of life. He felt very emphatic for her, paused to decide what to, but He walked around her, went into the white house, and picked up Michael and they escaped with an SUV. They sped out of the neighborhood on their way to the airport. 

Michael had a similar dream. It was about the same family member. They were running for a fallout shelter and they got inside. Michael wanted to wait for her, but someone closed it and locked them in from the outside. He was looking out of the window and saw her as an atomic bomb went off and she was vaporized. 

Then Jacob had a vision while he was praying for her. It was like the previous ones but with a different outcome. She was in a hospital bed, dying of a disease. They were on the other side of some glass. She held up a piece of paper that said, "Please forgive me." Jacob found the paper was then in his hands and he wrote back, "I will." Then she coded and died. He sees these different dreams as presenting two different outcomes to her life. Throughout the vision Jacob cried hard because for her to ask for forgiveness was a miracle and one of the most wanted desires of his heart.
Music Video Instructions: If you feel you have failed yourself and others, and even God, bring this honesty to your father who still receives you.
